kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:8081, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8081/api/users path_url=/api/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '75', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "rf_test_user", "password": "Test@123456", "role": "merchant"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=期望 HTTP ${expected_status}, 实际 HTTP ${response.status_code} | Body: ${response.text}
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=期望 code=${expected_code}, 实际 code=${json}[code] | Body: ${response.text}
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.name: TC_USER_02_查询用户列表_包含新增用户

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8081/api/products path_url=/api/products headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:8081/api/products status=200, reason=OK headers={'Server': 'Werkzeug/3.1.8 Python/3.14.2', 'Date': 'Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:05:02 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '1331', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Connection': 'close'} body={ "code": 200, "data": [ { "created_at": "2024-06-15 10:30:00", "description": "\u65d7\u8230\u667a\u80fd\u624b\u673a\uff0c\u536b\u661f\u901a\u8bdd", "id": 1, "name": "\u534e\u4e3aMate 60 Pro", "price": 6999.0, "stock": 50 }, { "created_at": null, "description": "A16\u82af\u7247\uff0c4800\u4e07\u50cf\u7d20", "id": 2, "name": "\u82f9\u679ciPhone 15", "price": 7999.0, "stock": 30 }, { "created_at": null, "description": "\u5f95\u5361\u5149\u5b66\uff0c\u9a81\u9f998Gen3", "id": 3, "name": "\u5c0f\u7c7314 Ultra", "price": 5999.0, "stock": 80 }, { "created_at": null, "description": "\u884c\u4e1a\u6807\u6746\u964d\u566a\uff0c30\u5c0f\u65f6\u7eed\u822a", "id": 4, "name": "\u7d22\u5c3c\u964d\u566a\u8033\u673aWH-1000XM5", "price": 2499.0, "stock": 120 }, { "created_at": null, "description": "12\u4ee3\u9177\u777fi7\uff0cRTX3060\uff0c\u521b\u4f5c\u672c", "id": 5, "name": "\u6234\u5c14\u7075\u8d8a16 Plus", "price": 7299.0, "stock": 25 }, { "created_at": "2026-06-22 15:30:51", "description": "", "id": 8, "name": "\u963f\u53d1", "price": 65.0, "stock": 64 } ] }
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: To Json
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.To Json' is deprecated. Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.

To JSON using : content={ "code": 200, "data": [ { "created_at": "2024-06-15 10:30:00", "description": "\u65d7\u8230\u667a\u80fd\u624b\u673a\uff0c\u536b\u661f\u901a\u8bdd", "id": 1, "name": "\u534e\u4e3aMate 60 Pro", "price": 6999.0, "stock": 50 }, { "created_at": null, "description": "A16\u82af\u7247\uff0c4800\u4e07\u50cf\u7d20", "id": 2, "name": "\u82f9\u679ciPhone 15", "price": 7999.0, "stock": 30 }, { "created_at": null, "description": "\u5f95\u5361\u5149\u5b66\uff0c\u9a81\u9f998Gen3", "id": 3, "name": "\u5c0f\u7c7314 Ultra", "price": 5999.0, "stock": 80 }, { "created_at": null, "description": "\u884c\u4e1a\u6807\u6746\u964d\u566a\uff0c30\u5c0f\u65f6\u7eed\u822a", "id": 4, "name": "\u7d22\u5c3c\u964d\u566a\u8033\u673aWH-1000XM5", "price": 2499.0, "stock": 120 }, { "created_at": null, "description": "12\u4ee3\u9177\u777fi7\uff0cRTX3060\uff0c\u521b\u4f5c\u672c", "id": 5, "name": "\u6234\u5c14\u7075\u8d8a16 Plus", "price": 7299.0, "stock": 25 }, { "created_at": "2026-06-22 15:30:51", "description": "", "id": 8, "name": "\u963f\u53d1", "price": 65.0, "stock": 64 } ] }

${json} = {'code': 200, 'data': [{'created_at': '2024-06-15 10:30:00', 'description': '旗舰智能手机，卫星通话', 'id': 1, 'name': '华为Mate 60 Pro', 'price': 6999.0, 'stock': 50}, {'created_at': None, 'description': 'A16芯片，4...
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED* Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.

iter.var: {'created_at': '2024-06-15 10:30:00', 'description': '旗舰智能手机，卫星通话', 'id': 1, 'name': '华为Mate 60 Pro', 'price': 6999.0, 'stock': 50}
{'created_at': None, 'description': '徕卡光学，骁龙8Gen3', 'id': 3, 'name': '小米14 Ultra', 'price': 5999.0, 'stock': 80}
{'created_at': None, 'description': '行业标杆降噪，30小时续航', 'id': 4, 'name': '索尼降噪耳机WH-1000XM5', 'price': 2499.0, 'stock': 120}
{'created_at': None, 'description': '12代酷睿i7，RTX3060，创作本', 'id': 5, 'name': '戴尔灵越16 Plus', 'price': 7299.0, 'stock': 25}

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:8081, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${body} = {'name': 'RF测试药品', 'batch_no': 'BATCH-RF-001', 'expiry_date': '2027-12-31', 'price': '25.50', 'stock': '200', 'manufacturer': '测试制药有限公司'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8081/api/medicines path_url=/api/medicines headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '197', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "RF\\u6d4b\\u8bd5\\u836f\\u54c1", "batch_no": "BATCH-RF-001", "expiry_date": "2027-12-31", "price": "25.50", "stock": "200", "manufacturer": "\\u6d4b\\u8bd5\\u5236\\u836f\\u6709\\u9650\\u516c\\u53f8"}'

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${json} = {'code': 200, 'data': {'batch_no': 'BATCH-RF-001', 'expiry_date': '2027-12-31', 'id': 40, 'manufacturer': '更新制药集团', 'name': 'RF测试药品', 'price': 25.5, 'stock': 200}, 'message': '更新成功'}
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8081/api/medicines path_url=/api/medicines headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '86', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "\\u65e0\\u6279\\u53f7\\u836f\\u54c1", "expiry_date": "2027-06-01", "price": "15"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=期望 HTTP ${expected_status}, 实际 HTTP ${response.status_code} | Body: ${response.text}
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:8081/api/medicines/40 path_url=/api/medicines/40 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=期望 code=${expected_code}, 实际 code=${json}[code] | Body: ${response.text}
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8081/api/medicines/40 path_url=/api/medicines/40 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=期望 HTTP ${expected_status}, 实际 HTTP ${response.status_code} | Body: ${response.text}
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Run Keywords
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8081/api/medicines path_url=/api/medicines headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: To Json
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.To Json' is deprecated. Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.

${json} = {'code': 200, 'data': [{'batch_no': 'AM20250301', 'expiry_date': '2027-03-01', 'id': 1, 'manufacturer': '华南制药有限公司', 'name': '阿莫西林胶囊', 'price': 12.5, 'stock': 500}, {'batch_no': '969', 'expiry_date': '...
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED* Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.

iter.var: {'batch_no': 'AM20250301', 'expiry_date': '2027-03-01', 'id': 1, 'manufacturer': '华南制药有限公司', 'name': '阿莫西林胶囊', 'price': 12.5, 'stock': 500}

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

errors.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.To Json' is deprecated. Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.
